steps.title: Check the center values
steps.content:
The temperatures are $81$, $80$, $81$, $81$, and $82$. Ordered, they are:
$$80,81,81,81,82$$
The median is $81$, the mode is $81$, and the mean is:
$$\frac{81+80+81+81+82}{5}=\frac{405}{5}=81$$

steps.title: Find the range
steps.content: The range is the maximum value minus the minimum value: $$82-80=2$$ This is the only listed quantity that is not equal to $81$. The answer is D.
